$comment: Permissions config for the chief-of-staff agent. Tiers grant the agent the right to take specific side-effect actions. Default new actors to tier 0 (read-only + draft-to-self). Raise an actor's tier deliberately, per action class, and watch the audit log in data/permit-audit.jsonl.

tiers.0: Read only. Drafts land in my inbox via send-to-self.
tiers.1: Inbox and calendar housekeeping. Archive newsletters, label threads, decline obvious calendar spam (no human attendees, marketing invites, double-bookings with explicit lower-priority).
tiers.2: Short acknowledgments and routine reschedules. Send 2-line acks to people on the warm list, accept 1:1 reschedules within the same week.
tiers.3: Pre-approved item execution. Act on a specific queue item that I have explicitly approved by id.

calendar.decline-spam.scope: no human attendees or marketing invites only

email.send-ack.scope: <=2 lines, to known counterparty, no commitments

email.send-external.scope: only for a queue item with approval_state=approved and required_tier<=3

calendar.create-event.scope: only for a queue item with approval_state=approved
